name: diff_lengths_can_match
code:
proof fn phi_3_diff_lengths_can_match(s1: Seq<u8>, s2: Seq<u8>, eq: bool)
    requires
        eq == (s1 == s2),
        s1.len() != s2.len(),
    ensures
        eq == true,
{
}
reason: Would mean vectors of different lengths could be considered equal, violating length check

name: not_reflexive
code:
proof fn phi_4_not_reflexive(s: Seq<u8>, eq: bool)
    requires
        eq == (s == s),
    ensures
        eq == false,
{
}
reason: Would mean a vector compared against itself is reported as not matching, breaking reflexivity

name: single_diff_ignored
code:
proof fn phi_5_single_diff_ignored(s1: Seq<u8>, s2: Seq<u8>, eq: bool)
    requires
        s1.len() == s2.len(),
        s1.len() > 0,
        s1[0] != s2[0],
        eq == (s1 == s2),
    ensures
        eq == true,
{
}
reason: Would mean a difference in the first element is ignored, so distinct vectors are treated as equal
